concept.description: Creates a relation DEFINED_BY between all test cases from test reports and the class which defined it.
concept.cypher: MATCH (testcase:TestCase) WITH testcase MATCH (testclass:Type) WHERE testclass.fqn = testcase.className MERGE (testcase)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(testclass) RETURN testcase.name AS TestCase, testclass AS TestClass

concept.description: Creates a relation IMPLEMENTED_BY between all test cases from test reports and their implementing methods.
concept.cypher: MATCH (testcase:TestCase)-[:DEFINED_BY]->(testclass:Type), (testclass)-[:EXTENDS*0..]->(:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(testmethod:Method) WHERE testmethod.name = testcase.name MERGE (testcase)-[:IMPLEMENTED_BY]->(testmethod) RETURN testcase.name AS TestCase, testmethod as TestMethod

concept.description: Concept labeling all @Disabled-annotated elements with :JUnit:Inactive:Test and setting the according reason.
concept.cypher: MATCH (t:Type)-[:DECLARES*0..1]->(e), (e)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(disabled:Annotation)-[:OF_TYPE]->(ignoreType:Type {fqn: "org.junit.jupiter.api.Disabled"}) OPTIONAL MATCH (disabled)-[:HAS]->(value:Value {name:"value"}) SET e:JUnit:Inactive:Test, e.inactiveReason = value.value RETURN t AS DeclaringType, e AS Element, e.inactiveReason AS Reason

concept.description: Concept labeling all @Ignore-annotated elements with :JUnit:Inactive:Test and setting the according reason.
concept.cypher: MATCH (t:Type)-[:DECLARES*0..1]->(e), (e)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(disabled:Annotation)-[:OF_TYPE]->(ignoreType:Type {fqn: "org.junit.Ignore"}) OPTIONAL MATCH (disabled)-[:HAS]->(value:Value {name:"value"}) SET e:JUnit:Inactive:Test, e.inactiveReason = value.value RETURN t AS DeclaringType, e AS Element, e.inactiveReason AS Reason

constraint.description: Inactive tests must be provided with an according reason.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (t:Type)-[:DECLARES*0..1]->(e:Inactive:Test) WHERE e.inactiveReason IS NULL RETURN t AS DeclaringClass, e AS InactiveTestWithoutReason
